\centry{Rising Scholars Summer Institute}{Program Content Manager}{Sacramento, CA}{January 2019 -- May 2019}
\begin{itemize}
  \item Developed lesson plans, activity guides, and instructional materials for 120 students (ages 8--14) anchored in STEM, Creative Writing, and Civic Leadership themes
  \item Trained and supervised 52 camp counselors and activity leads in lesson delivery, youth development principles, and behavior management strategies
  \item Managed the program curriculum budget, sourcing cost-effective supplies and partnering with local businesses to secure in-kind donations of materials
\end{itemize}
